title: Field Fat — Shannon entropy pack storage (not Microsoft FAT)
motto: FFAT\x03ENT · measured pack ratio · guaranteed = pool · never fake ×N
yes: Partition type 0xE0 Field Fat at LBA 2048
Virtual AMMOFAT geometry for Field Die fatPack (Primer ch.08 bus only)
Frame map + pack pool: ZERO / RLE / PAK / RAW / REF
PAK peak–angle: control points + angle up/down ramps → more samples than points
Shannon H = −Σ pᵢ log₂ pᵢ per 4 KiB frame (Primer ch.04 / ch.14)
guaranteed_bytes = physical pool (worst case unique high-H RAW)
pack_ratio = logical_stored / physical_used — measured after writes only

honesty.shannon: ideal lossless size ≥ (H/8)·frame for each frame
honesty.empty_volume: pack_ratio reports 1.000 — no free lunch claimed until data written
gain_sources: PAK peaks + angle-up/angle-down ramps (structured field signals)
honesty.pak_note: One PEAK/VALLEY record reconstructs many samples along both slopes — more logical data than stored points

primer.entropy: ch.04 ThermoAccountant vs Shannon file oracle — separate plates
primer.die: ch.08 fatPack slots [12–15] virtual geometry only
primer.shannon: ch.14 H on byte histogram — storm gauge, also pack budget

big_drive.note: doctrine no longer claims fixed ×91; use measured pack_ratio

access: spear ffat-probe | ffat-put | ffat-get | field1-status — not mount -t vfat
